executives.name: Gregory A. Lang
executives.background: Mr. Lang has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry. Prior to joining NOVAGOLD, he served as President of Barrick Gold North America. He has held various senior executive positions at Barrick Gold Corporation and Homestake Mining Company.

executives.name: David A. Ottewell
executives.background: Mr. Ottewell has over 30 years of mining industry experience. Before joining NOVAGOLD, he was Vice President and Controller of Newmont Mining Corporation. He is a Certified Public Accountant.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Ron Rimelman
executives.background: Mr. Rimelman has over 35 years of experience in environmental management and permitting. He previously served as Vice President, Environment, Health, Safety and Sustainability for NOVAGOLD and has extensive experience with the Donlin Gold project.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Environmental, Health, Safety & Sustainability

executives.name: Richard Williams
executives.background: Mr. Williams has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in project development and operations. He previously held senior roles at Barrick Gold Corporation.

executives.name: Tricia Pannier
executives.background: Ms. Pannier has over 20 years of experience in corporate law and governance. She previously served as Corporate Counsel for various mining and natural resource companies.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary

board_of_directors.name: Thomas S. Kaplan
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Kaplan is the Chairman of the Board and has been a director since 2008. He is an entrepreneur and investor in the natural resources sector and is the Chairman and CEO of The Electrum Group LLC.

board_of_directors.name: Gregory A. Lang
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Lang is the President and CEO of the Company and has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: Elaine Dorward-King
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Dorward-King has over 30 years of experience in the mining and chemical industries, with a focus on sustainability and environmental strategy. She previously held senior roles at Newmont and Rio Tinto.
committees: Health, Safety, Environment and Sustainability Committee

board_of_directors.name: Diane R. Garrett
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Garrett has more than 25 years of experience in the mining industry. She is currently the President and CEO of Hycroft Mining Holding Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Christopher L. Mancini
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Mancini is a research analyst at Gabelli Funds with over 30 years of experience in the investment industry, focusing on the metals and mining sector.

board_of_directors.name: Kalidas V. Madhavpeddi
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Madhavpeddi has over 40 years of experience in the international mining industry. He is the former CEO of China Molybdenum International and held senior roles at Phelps Dodge.

board_of_directors.name: Ethan Schapira
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Schapira is a founding partner of M. Schapira & Co. Inc. and has extensive experience in corporate finance and strategic advisory.

board_of_directors.name: Anthony P. Walsh
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Walsh has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry and was the President and CEO of Miramar Mining Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Dawn Whittaker
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Whittaker is a senior lawyer with over 30 years of experience in corporate law, mergers and acquisitions, and corporate governance.
